use_cases: Displaying status indicators such as active, inactive, or pending states in dashboards
Showing numeric counts like notification badges or cart item totals
Labeling content with category tags or role indicators
Indicating system feedback with success, warning, or destructive variants
Marking items with visual prominence in lists or card components
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with multiple color variants (primary, secondary, success, warning, info, destructive, outline) and size options (sm, md, lg). Built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS for accessibility and utility-first styling. Supports disabled states with opacity and pointer-events handling, making it suitable for displaying status indicators, counts, labels, and category tags across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tool applications.
